hero.title: Travel as a guest, not as a tourist
hero.subtitle: The Riviera Maya awaits you with unique experiences

history.title: Our History

values.passionDesc: Love for showing the best of Mexico

history.description: Our story begins when destiny gave us an unexpected turn. As a result of the pandemic, life took us from the big Mexico City to the paradise of the Riviera Maya. Venturing into tourism and hospitality, we understood that modern tourism had become cold and automated. That's why we decided to go against the current: Offer a more human, friendly and personal treatment in an increasingly digital world. We firmly believe that a robot cannot hear your dreams or understand what makes a trip special, we realized that the industry had become cold. But we believe that a robot can never replace the embrace of a good host. We are the result of the union of two cultures: the DUTCH structure and the unmatched MEXICAN warmth. This fusion allowed us to build a proudly 100% MEXICAN company.
history.missionText: Not to make clients, but FRIENDS. My House Is Your House.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: We design experiences, not just trips.

cards.transportationDesc: Airport, point to point and open service.
cards.accommodationDesc: Hotels, homes and condos in the Riviera Maya.
cards.toursDesc: Aquatic, archaeological, theme parks and more.

1.text: Excellent service, everything was very well organized. The Tropical Vitamin team made our trip an unforgettable experience.

2.text: The best experience in the Riviera Maya. Punctual transportation and spectacular tours. Totally recommended.

3.text: Perfect graduation trip. The team took care of every detail. We will be back!

q1.question: What is the best time to visit the Riviera Maya?
q1.answer: The best time is from November to April, when the weather is dry and temperatures are pleasant. However, the region offers unique experiences throughout the year.

q2.question: Do you include transportation from the airport?
q2.answer: Yes, we have airport-hotel transportation service in all our options: shared, private, luxury and bus.

q3.question: Can I book tours for large groups?
q3.answer: Absolutely! We have experience organizing events for large groups, conventions and company trips. Contact us for a personalized quote.

q4.question: What is the cancellation policy?
q4.answer: Our cancellation policy varies by service. Generally, you can cancel up to 48 hours before without charge. We recommend checking the specific terms at the time of booking.

q5.question: Do you offer travel insurance?
q5.answer: Yes, we can help you purchase travel insurance that covers your stay. Ask us about the available options.

mice.title: Groups & Conventions
mice.intro: We organize corporate events, conventions and MICE tourism with the highest quality standards.
mice.subtitle: We take care of every detail so your event is a success.

hero.subtitle: We know that all groups are different and with different planning and objectives.
hero.text:
We are focused on creating memorable group experiences and with the coordination structure appropriate to each group need. Don't worry about massive logistics, we have extensive experience in group management and handling!

At Tropical Vitamin we coordinate the entire planning, organization, control, management, production and logistics of the entire group at the destination, concluding until your departure and the end of your event.
Don't worry, leave it in our hands!

groups.miceDesc: Meetings, Incentives, Conferences and Exhibitions: We are your eyes in the destination! Rely on the experts to start the search from the venue to all the coordination and management you need for your event.
groups.teamDesc: Creative corporate experiences and with a defined objective for strengthening the corporate team.
groups.bodaDesc: Back yourself with us for the logistics of your event without worrying about anything or anyone, live the best moment of your life next to your love.
groups.viajerosDesc: There is no better vitamin for the soul than the memories of adventures. Let us show you the side of the Riviera Maya that you don't know.
groups.familiaDesc: "Láak'tsilil" means Family in Maya. Reconnect in a paradise full of unforgettable vegetation and experiences.
groups.escolaresDesc: Live one of the best stages of your life in the company of your best friends. We guarantee it will be part of stories they will have to tell over and over again.
groups.deportivosDesc: We help you carry out your tournaments and manage your or the attending teams for sports coordination.

cta.title: Planning a corporate event?
cta.subtitle: Contact us and we'll help you organize it

thematic.title: Thematic Trips Service
thematic.intro: Celebrate your special moments with unique and unforgettable experiences in the Riviera Maya.

hero.subtitle: Every special moment and celebration deserves that detail that makes it unique.
hero.text:
At Tropical Vitamin we coordinate the entire planning, organization, control, management, production and logistics of each specialized event.
Let us help you with your celebration!

trips.despedidaDesc: The phrases "Will you marry me?" and "Yes, I do!" are the magic words to start a new stage. There's no better place to celebrate than the Mexican Caribbean: beach, party, gastronomy and the best places to celebrate LOVE!
trips.bienvenidaDesc: As the saying goes: "Life is tastier in the sea." Come celebrate the decisions, what you've lived, and what's to come because you only live once.
trips.graduacionDesc: You worked hard for it, so a graduation trip is what you deserve. Celebrate your achievement, organize the most adventurous graduation trip with your friends.
trips.familiaDesc: Family connection, integration, and love purpose trips. They don't just come for vacation, they come to experience where you connect with your family in every way.
trips.cumpleanosDesc: Celebrate your life and celebrate with your loved ones! We organize all the details you deserve for your day and celebration.
trips.pedidaDesc: One of the most anticipated moments and it has to be UNIQUE. We help you have a magical and full of love surprise.

thematic.description: An experience designed specifically to make this moment special and memorable.

cta.title: Have a celebration in mind?
cta.subtitle: Tell us and we take care of everything
